# MDE 1.5.8

## Features

- Explorer now opens workspaces with a lazy first-level tree instead of recursively loading every nested directory up front.
- Directories that contain no Markdown documents are hidden by default and can be shown with the existing "Show hidden entries" toolbar action.
- Expanding a directory now loads that directory on demand, including any ancestor directories needed for deep paths.
- Editor link suggestions can still find Markdown documents across the workspace even when the Explorer tree has not expanded those folders yet.

## Bug Fixes

- Fixed create, paste, and link-document flows so newly affected parent directories are refreshed after lazy loading is enabled.
- Kept newly created or empty target folders visible so users can create files or paste Markdown into them before they contain documents.
- Preserved recently opened deep files by hydrating their ancestor folders before reopening them from workspace history.

## Breaking Changes

- None.

## Maintenance

- Added IPC support for listing Markdown file paths separately from the Explorer tree.
- Added unit, integration, and E2E coverage for lazy Explorer trees, default-hidden non-Markdown directories, deep directory refresh, and link suggestions.

## Documentation

- Updated the user manual to explain that Explorer defaults to Markdown-relevant folders and loads folder contents on demand.

## Verification

- `pnpm run lint`
- `pnpm run typecheck`
- `pnpm run docs:build`
- `pnpm run test:unit`
- `pnpm run test:integration`
- `pnpm run test:e2e`

## Artifacts

- macOS DMG and ZIP artifacts are built by the GitHub Release workflow.
- Windows NSIS installer artifacts are built by the GitHub Release workflow.
